title: Responsive Orchestrator — C4 Model
scope: Daemon-internal architecture for async task tool dispatch with disk-terminal delivery

systems.name: OpenCode Daemon
systems.description: Single-user persistent process managing sessions, providers, workers, and the bus. Hosts both main agent runloop and subagent worker subprocesses.

systems.name: LLM Provider
systems.description: External: Codex / Anthropic / OpenAI APIs. Subject to rate-limits and quotas this spec must cooperate with.

systems.name: Web UI / TUI Client
systems.description: User-facing client. Reads parent session over SSE; renders synthetic <task_result> messages alongside real user/assistant turns.

containers.name: Main Daemon Process
containers.description: The opencode serve process. Owns parent sessions, the Bus, the worker registry, the task tool runtime.

containers.name: Subagent Worker Subprocess
containers.description: Forked per task dispatch. Runs its own runloop in its own session; communicates with C1 via stdout IPC + Storage shared filesystem.

components.name: ParentSessionRunloop
components.description: session/prompt.ts — drives main agent's tool-use loop. After this spec: no longer awaits task tool result; turn closes after stub returned.

components.name: TaskToolRuntime
components.description: tool/task.ts — execute() returns dispatched stub immediately; spawns background watcher.

components.name: BackgroundTaskWatcher
components.description: Detached promise per dispatched task. Owns watchdog A/B/C polling loop. Emits TaskCompletedEvent.

components.name: TaskResultInjector
components.description: Bus subscriber for TaskCompletedEvent. Builds and appends synthetic MessageV2.User to parent session.

components.name: CancelTaskTool
components.description: tool/cancel-task.ts — looks up worker by jobId, sends abort signal. New tool exposed to main agent.

components.name: WorkerRegistry
components.description: task.ts internal workers[] array + assignedWorkerID tracking. Now keyed also by jobId for cancel_task lookup.

components.name: Bus
components.description: Existing Bus singleton. New event type: TaskCompletedEvent.

components.name: SubagentRunloop
components.description: session/processor.ts shared code. Modified for child-session escalation timeout (R3) and post-turn quota wrap-up (R6).

components.name: QuotaSelfMonitor
components.description: Reuses checkCodexLowQuotaAndMark for child sessions; sets quotaLowExitRequested flag.

components.name: Storage (shared filesystem)
components.description: Existing Storage namespace. session/<sid>/messages/<mid>/info.json carries finish field — the substrate for disk-terminal delivery.

relationships.label: appends synthetic user message + wakes runloop
